assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddStackExchangeRedisCache with the Redis connection string from configuration
ICache<> is replaced with a distributed cache implementation (e.g. DistributedCache<> or equivalent) via AddSingleton or similar registration
assertions.rationale: Does not replace ICache<> with DistributedCache<>. Only registers IDistributedCache via AddStackExchangeRedisCache, but IdentityServer's caching uses ICache<T> which defaults to in-memory — the Redis cache is never wired into IdentityServer's caching layer.

assertions.assertion: AddConfigurationStoreCache() is called after the configuration store registration
ClientStoreExpiration is set to 10 minutes via IdentityServerOptions.Caching
assertions.rationale: No ClientStoreExpiration is configured anywhere; defaults are used

assertions.assertion: ResourceStoreExpiration is set to 10 minutes via IdentityServerOptions.Caching
assertions.rationale: No ResourceStoreExpiration is configured anywhere; defaults are used
